# Stratified iteration-loop subset of corpus/synthetic/.
# Generated by scripts/select_synthetic_iter.py --seed 20260518 --per-raster 30.
# Guarantee: every individual axis level (progression, decomp,
# cblk, tile, rate, layers, mct, sop_eph, container) appears at
# least once per raster. Cross-axis interactions are NOT covered
# — that's the full-sweep deliverable run's job.
# Total files: 90
